channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: One Classic Title Makes 'Rugrats: Retro Rewind' Worth a Look
item.description: A standout PS1 game in Limited Run's upcoming Nickelodeon collection has drawn renewed interest in the retro compilation.

item.title: Reed Hastings Says AI Will Elevate the Value of Humanities Education
item.description: Netflix co-founder Reed Hastings donated $50 million to Bowdoin College to fund a program combining artificial intelligence with a humanities curriculum.

item.title: Samsung Expanding One UI 8.5 Update to More Galaxy Devices
item.description: Samsung's One UI 8.5 rollout will reach older Galaxy phones including the S23 series, though some advanced AI features will not be included.

item.title: Former Costa Rica President on Reforming Global Fertilizer Subsidies
item.description: An op-ed argues that $700 billion in global fertilizer subsidies reinforce supply chain vulnerabilities rather than building resilience against price shocks.
